summary: Deterministic validation flagged #8147 and #86035 as security-sensitive, so both exact refs are quarantined with route_security. Closed duplicate context #39821 and #19859 remains non-mutating keep_closed. PR #73390 remains blocked from superseded closeout because the replacement path cannot proceed while the canonical/security-linked fix lane is routed to central security handling. The cluster-level fix lane is downgraded to needs_human; no executable fix artifact is emitted.

actions.reason: Quarantine the exact canonical issue for central OpenClaw security handling before any further ProjectClownfish fix or closeout work.
